basic_details.job_title: BCPL Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 26 Senior Engineer, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Brahmaputra Cracker and Polymer Limited (BCPL) has released the official Executive Posts Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 26 vacancies have been announced under the BCPL Executive Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Technology, CA/ICWA, Associate Membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India, MBA/PG Diploma in Management/MMS, and other relevant disciplines can apply online from 2 July 2026 to 01 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 54 years for General Manager, 50 years for Deputy General Manager, 45 years for Chief Manager, 30-35 years for other posts. Max 56 years with relaxations.
age_limit.details: General Manager (Chemical): Maximum age is 54 years. Deputy General Manager (Fire & Safety): Maximum age is 50 years. Chief Manager (Fire & Safety): Maximum age is 45 years. Senior Engineer (Chemical): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Officer (Company Secretariat): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Engineer (Environment): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Officer (Finance & Accounts): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Engineer (Instrumentation): Maximum age is 30 years. All Posts: Maximum age is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: 05 years, OBC (NCL): 03 years, PwBD-General/EWS: 10 years, PwBD-OBC(NCL): 13 years, PwBD-SC/ST: 15 years, Domiciled in J&K: 05 years, Ex-servicemen: 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology, CA/ICWA, Associate membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India, Bachelor's degree in relevant disciplines with minimum marks, MBA/PG Diploma in Management/MMS with specialization.
qualification.details: General Manager (Chemical): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Chemical / Petrochemical / Chemical Technology / Petrochemical Technology. Deputy General Manager (Fire & Safety): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Fire / Fire & Safety with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates having one year Diploma in Industrial Safety from a Central / Regional Labour Institute recognized by Govt. Chief Manager (Fire & Safety): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Fire / Fire & Safety with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates having one year Diploma in Industrial Safety from a Central / Regional Labour Institute recognized by Govt. Senior Engineer (Chemical): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Chemical / Petrochemical / Chemical Technology / Petrochemical Technology with minimum 60% marks. Senior Officer (Company Secretariat): Associate membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India. Additional qualification of ICWA / CA / Bachelor degree in Law will be desirable. Senior Engineer (Environment): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Environmental with minimum 60% marks. Senior Officer (Finance & Accounts): CA / ICWA OR B.Com with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA) with Honours in Economics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA/B.Sc.) with Honours in Mathematics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA/B.Sc.) with Honours in Statistics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation in Engineering* i.e. B.E./B.Tech. with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing CA / ICWA qualification should hold Fellow / Associate membership of ICAI / ICWAI. Senior Engineer (Instrumentation): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Instrumentation / Instrumentation & Control / Electronics & Instrumentation / Electrical & Instrumentation / Electronics / Electrical & Electronics with minimum 60% marks.

salary_details.details: The salary includes Basic Pay, Industrial Dearness Allowance (IDA), Perquisites @ 35% of basic pay, North-East allowance @ 10% of basic pay (if posted in North-East region), HRA, CMER, Medical Facility, Post Retirement Medical Scheme (PRMS), and Defined Contribution Pension Scheme (DCPS).

selection_process: Written Test Group Discussion Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BCPL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.brahmaputra_cracker_and_polymer_limited_: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology, CA/ICWA, Associate membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India, Bachelor's degree in relevant disciplines with minimum marks, MBA/PG Diploma in Management/MMS with specialization.
Max 54 years for General Manager, 50 years for Deputy General Manager, 45 years for Chief Manager, 30-35 years for other posts. Max 56 years with relaxations.

content_sections.heading: BCPL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BCPL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BCPL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BCPL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: General Manager (Chemical): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Chemical / Petrochemical / Chemical Technology / Petrochemical Technology. Deputy General Manager (Fire & Safety): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Fire / Fire & Safety with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates having one year Diploma in Industrial Safety from a Central / Regional Labour Institute recognized by Govt. Chief Manager (Fire & Safety): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Fire / Fire & Safety with minimum 55% marks. Preference will be given to candidates having one year Diploma in Industrial Safety from a Central / Regional Labour Institute recognized by Govt. Senior Engineer (Chemical): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Chemical / Petrochemical / Chemical Technology / Petrochemical Technology with minimum 60% marks. Senior Officer (Company Secretariat): Associate membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India. Additional qualification of ICWA / CA / Bachelor degree in Law will be desirable. Senior Engineer (Environment): Bachelor degree in Engineering* in Environmental with minimum 60% marks. Senior Officer (Finance & Accounts): CA / ICWA OR B.Com with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA) with Honours in Economics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA/B.Sc.) with Honours in Mathematics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation (BA/B.Sc.) with Honours in Statistics with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. OR Graduation in Engineering* i.e. B.E./B.Tech. with minimum 60% marks and Two years MBA** with specialization in Finance with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing CA / ICWA qualification should hold Fellow / Associate membership of ICAI / ICWAI. Senior Engineer (Instrumentation): Bachelor Degree in Engineering* in Instrumentation / Instrumentation & Control / Electronics & Instrumentation / Electrical & Instrumentation / Electronics / Electrical & Electronics with minimum 60% marks.

content_sections.heading: BCPL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: General Manager (Chemical): Maximum age is 54 years. Deputy General Manager (Fire & Safety): Maximum age is 50 years. Chief Manager (Fire & Safety): Maximum age is 45 years. Senior Engineer (Chemical): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Officer (Company Secretariat): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Engineer (Environment): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Officer (Finance & Accounts): Maximum age is 30 years. Senior Engineer (Instrumentation): Maximum age is 30 years. All Posts: Maximum age is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: 05 years, OBC (NCL): 03 years, PwBD-General/EWS: 10 years, PwBD-OBC(NCL): 13 years, PwBD-SC/ST: 15 years, Domiciled in J&K: 05 years, Ex-servicemen: 3 years.

content_sections.heading: BCPL Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: The salary includes Basic Pay, Industrial Dearness Allowance (IDA), Perquisites @ 35% of basic pay, North-East allowance @ 10% of basic pay (if posted in North-East region), HRA, CMER, Medical Facility, Post Retirement Medical Scheme (PRMS), and Defined Contribution Pension Scheme (DCPS).

rows.event: Availability of online Application Forms and other prescribed documents
Last date of receipt of online Application Form

content_sections.heading: BCPL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Group Discussion Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BCPL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Brahmaputra Cracker and Polymer Limited (BCPL) Executive Posts is August 1, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies announced for various Executive Posts in Brahmaputra Cracker and Polymer Limited (BCPL) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification includes a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology, CA/ICWA, or an Associate membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India, among others, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post, ranging from 30 years for some engineer/officer roles up to 54 years for General Manager. A maximum age of 56 years is also mentioned with relaxations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: The application fee for General, EWS, and OBC (NCL) categories is Rs 600/-. Specific details for other categories should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BCPL Executive Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Group Discussion, and finally a Personal Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply for more than one post?
faq.answer: No, candidates are required to apply for ONE post ONLY. Applying for multiple posts may lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the starting date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application process for BCPL Executive Posts begins on July 2, 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What are the benefits offered to selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a comprehensive salary package including Basic Pay, IDA, Perquisites, North-East allowance (if applicable), HRA, and other benefits like medical facilities and pension schemes.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
